meaning: adj.<美>非国防军用的,与军事防御无关的
examples: Reagan's policies included a strong dollar, large tax cuts, lower nondefense spending and reduced government regulation.
The sequester was designed to be objectionable and onerous -- both the cuts in defense spending and nondefense spending.
The automatic spending cuts will be divided mostly between defense spending and nondefense spending unrelated to Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid.
